description: 将 Swixter CLI 改造为 Bun workspaces monorepo，新增 Astro 首页 + Starlight 文档站，部署到 Cloudflare Pages

userStories.title: Move CLI source files to packages/cli/
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to move all existing CLI source files into packages/cli/ so that the monorepo structure is ready for additional packages.
acceptanceCriteria: Move src/ → packages/cli/src/
Move tests/ → packages/cli/tests/
Move test/ (E2E) → packages/cli/test/
Move scripts/ → packages/cli/scripts/
Move ui/ (React Web UI) → packages/cli/ui/
packages/cli/ directory structure matches expectations (verify with ls -R)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: 纯文件迁移，不修改任何文件内容。移动后确认目录结构正确即可。

userStories.title: Update CLI package.json paths and internal imports, verify build and tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to update all path references in package.json, tsconfig, and internal imports so that the CLI builds, tests, and E2E pass after migration.
acceptanceCriteria: packages/cli/package.json: update main, bin, files, scripts paths for new directory layout
packages/cli/tsconfig.json: update include/exclude paths if needed
Update any internal import paths that reference old src/ structure
bun run build succeeds, produces packages/cli/dist/cli/index.js
bun test passes all unit tests
bun run test:e2e passes E2E tests (Docker-based)
npm pack --dry-run from packages/cli/ produces correct package contents (only dist/ files)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: CLI 功能代码不修改，只更新路径引用。重点关注 import 路径、构建输出路径、npm files 字段。

userStories.title: Create root Bun workspace config and version sync script
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need a root package.json with Bun workspaces and a sync-versions.js script so that all packages share a single version number.
acceptanceCriteria: Root package.json: name=swixter, private=true, workspaces=['packages/cli','packages/website','packages/docs']
Root scripts: build, build:cli, build:website, build:docs, test, cli, cli:dev, release:patch/minor/major
Root scripts: preversion runs bun test, version runs sync-versions.js, postversion pushes tags
scripts/sync-versions.js reads root version, writes to all 3 package.json + packages/cli/src/constants/meta.ts
bun install from root installs all workspace dependencies
bun run release:patch dry-run verifies version sync works end-to-end
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: 原 scripts/sync-version.js 重命名为 scripts/sync-versions.js 并扩展为多包同步。原 CLI npm scripts 移到 packages/cli/package.json。

userStories.title: Scaffold Astro homepage with Citron Terminal theme
userStories.description: As a user, I want a landing page at swixter.dev that showcases what Swixter does with a developer-focused dark theme.
acceptanceCriteria: packages/website/ initialized with Astro (npm create astro@latest, blank template)
Homepage (src/pages/index.astro) renders: Hero, Features cards, Quick Example code block, Footer
Hero section: title 'Swixter', description 'Manage AI coding assistant configurations with ease', install command 'npm install -g swixter' with copy button
Features section: 3-4 cards (Switch AI Providers, Multi-tool Support, Cloud Sync, CLI-first Design)
Quick Example: code block showing swixter claude switch → apply → claude workflow
Footer: GitHub link, npm link, docs link
Apply DESIGN.md Citron Terminal theme: background #151309, primary #d8c603, Inter font, 8px border-radius, Space Grotesk for labels
Zero client-side JavaScript (pure static Astro)
Responsive layout: mobile (single column), tablet (2-col cards), desktop (max-width 1440px)
bun run build from packages/website/ succeeds, produces dist/
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill (run astro preview and check homepage renders correctly)
userStories.notes: 参考设计文档中的首页布局 ASCII 线框图。不需要复杂动画或交互，纯静态展示。可参考 impeccable/frontend-design skill 提升设计质量。

userStories.title: Scaffold Astro Starlight docs site with Citron Terminal theme
userStories.description: As a user, I want documentation at docs.swixter.dev with search and navigation, themed consistently with the homepage.
acceptanceCriteria: packages/docs/ initialized with Astro Starlight (npm create astro@latest -- --template starlight)
Starlight CSS custom properties overridden with Citron Terminal colors from DESIGN.md
Sidebar navigation configured with all doc sections: Getting Started, Commands, Providers, Advanced
Site title/logo set to 'Swixter Docs'
Built-in search indexes all documentation pages
bun run build from packages/docs/ succeeds, produces dist/
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill (run astro preview and check docs site renders correctly)
userStories.notes: 仅搭建框架和主题，不写文档内容。内容由 US-006, US-007, US-008 完成。Starlight 的 CSS 变量名参考: https://starlight.astro.build/guides/css-and-tailwind/

userStories.title: Write getting-started documentation
userStories.description: As a new user, I want installation and quick-start guides so that I can set up Swixter in under 5 minutes.
acceptanceCriteria: packages/docs/src/content/docs/index.mdx: welcome page with project overview and quick links
packages/docs/src/content/docs/getting-started/installation.md: npm/brew/script install methods, platform notes, verify installed
packages/docs/src/content/docs/getting-started/quick-start.md: first profile creation, switch, apply, launch coder
packages/docs/src/content/docs/getting-started/configuration.md: config file locations, profile anatomy, provider selection
Content references real paths and CLI commands from CLAUDE.md (config paths, profile naming rules, apply flow)
Each page has at least one code example showing CLI commands
bun run build from packages/docs/ succeeds
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: 参考 CLAUDE.md 的 Configuration File Paths 表格、Quick Start 流程、Architecture Overview 部分。

userStories.title: Write command reference documentation
userStories.description: As a user, I want detailed documentation for every CLI command so that I can use all Swixter features effectively.
acceptanceCriteria: commands/claude.md: create, switch, list, delete, apply, run, edit, install, update-cli
commands/codex.md: same commands + env_key behavior + run workflow explanation
commands/qwen.md: Continue.dev adapter commands
commands/providers.md: add, remove, list, show, user-defined providers
commands/groups.md: group management commands if applicable
commands/proxy.md: proxy gateway commands if applicable
commands/sync.md: cloud sync commands
commands/ui.md: web UI launch command
Each command page includes: synopsis, usage examples, common workflows
Content covers adapter-specific behaviors from CLAUDE.md (e.g., Codex env_key priority, run command differences)
bun run build from packages/docs/ succeeds
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: 参考 CLAUDE.md 的 Adapter-specific behaviors、Important Design Patterns、Key Implementation Notes 以及 src/cli/ 下的实际命令实现。

userStories.title: Write provider configuration and advanced usage documentation
userStories.description: As a power user, I want to configure custom AI providers and learn advanced workflows like Windows setup and cloud sync.
acceptanceCriteria: providers/anthropic.md: API key setup, model selection, auth token support
providers/ollama.md: local setup, base URL, default env_key
providers/openai.md: OpenAI-compatible providers, wire_api requirements
providers/custom.md: user-defined provider creation, wire_api field explanation
advanced/windows.md: platform-specific paths, compatibility notes (from docs/WINDOWS.md)
advanced/cloud-sync.md: sync feature details, configuration, usage
advanced/proxy.md: proxy setup and advanced configuration
reference/changelog.md: link to GitHub CHANGELOG.md
Each provider page includes YAML/JSON/TOML config examples
bun run build from packages/docs/ succeeds
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: 参考 CLAUDE.md 的 Provider System、Configuration File Paths 表格、Windows Compatibility 章节。

userStories.title: Update CI/CD workflows for monorepo structure
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need GitHub Actions workflows updated so that CI testing and npm publishing work with the new packages/cli/ layout.
acceptanceCriteria: .github/workflows/test.yml: update paths to packages/cli/ for E2E test, build verification
.github/workflows/test.yml: add build:website and build:docs step to verify website/docs build in CI
.github/workflows/release.yml: npm publish runs from packages/cli/ directory
.github/workflows/release.yml: changelog extraction script path updated if needed
CI matrix (Linux/macOS/Windows, Node 18.x/20.x) unchanged
Workflow files reference Bun (oven-sh/setup-bun@v1) for all steps
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: 不删除原工作流逻辑，仅更新路径和添加 website/docs 构建验证。verify 用 bun run build:website && bun run build:docs 确认能构建成功。

userStories.title: Configure Cloudflare Pages for website and docs deployment
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want push-to-main auto-deployment so that the website and docs are always up to date.
acceptanceCriteria: Cloudflare Pages project 1: homepage, build dir packages/website/, command bun run build, output dist/
Cloudflare Pages project 2: docs, build dir packages/docs/, command bun run build, output dist/
Git integration connected to github.com/dawnswwwww/swixter main branch
Push to main triggers automatic build and deploy
Default .pages.dev URLs accessible and render correctly
DNS CNAME records prepared for swixter.dev and docs.swixter.dev (to be pointed later)
README.md updated with website and docs URLs
userStories.notes: 自定义域名由用户稍后配置，本 story 只确保 .pages.dev 默认域名可访问。Cloudflare Pages 需要在 Web UI 手动创建项目（不能完全自动化）。
